moments.title: World Cup Quarter-finals & Semi-finals
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 enters its thrilling quarter-final and semi-final stages this week, with England facing Norway and Spain playing Belgium in the quarter-finals, leading up to the final on July 19.

angles.name: England's Journey
angles.copy: It's Quarter-final day for England at the World Cup! Can the Three Lions roar into the semis? Tune in for every moment!

angles.name: Global Showdown
angles.copy: The World Cup knockout stages are firing up! Quarter-finals today and tomorrow, then the semis next week. Who's your pick for the final on July 19?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships conclude this weekend, with the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals taking place on Sunday, July 12. British hopeful Arthur Fery is in the men's singles semi-final today.

angles.name: Championship Point
angles.copy: Wimbledon's Grand Finale! The Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals are this weekend. Who will lift the trophies?

angles.name: British Hope
angles.copy: All eyes on Centre Court today as Britain's Arthur Fery competes in the Men's Singles Semi-final! Let's get behind him!

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins its tournament days next Thursday, July 16, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, with practice days starting this Sunday.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest
angles.copy: The Open Championship is just around the corner! Practice rounds start Sunday at Royal Birkdale, with the tournament proper teeing off next Thursday.

angles.name: Road to Birkdale
angles.copy: The world's best golfers head to Royal Birkdale for The Open! The Last-Chance Qualifier is on Monday, building excitement for Thursday's first round.

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival is happening this weekend, July 10-12, in Moseley Park, Birmingham, featuring innovative UK and international acts.

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: Birmingham! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival is ON this weekend at Moseley Park. Get your groove on!

angles.name: Soulful Sounds
angles.copy: Live music alert! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival kicks off today. Limited tickets still available for a weekend of incredible talent.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Two Weeks Away
moments.blurb: Klarna presents Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary with music, comedy, arts, and more.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Two weeks until Latitude Festival takes over Henham Park! Who's ready for a weekend of amazing music and arts?

angles.name: Suffolk's Big One
angles.copy: Suffolk, get ready! Latitude Festival is just around the corner. Celebrating 20 years of incredible music, comedy, and culture.

moments.title: Together Again Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Together Again Festival returns to Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire from July 24-26, promising world-class music, vibrant arenas, and a family-friendly atmosphere.

angles.name: Cheshire Calling
angles.copy: Together Again Festival is almost here! Next weekend, Bolesworth Castle hosts three days of music, arts, and good vibes. Who's in?

angles.name: Midsummer Escape
angles.copy: Looking for a festival escape? Together Again at Bolesworth Castle, July 24-26, brings big names in dance, pop, and UK garage. Tickets selling fast!

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Start Soon
moments.blurb: The long-awaited school summer holidays are set to begin for many pupils across England and Wales from around July 22, marking the start of the break.

angles.name: Summer Break Begins
angles.copy: Freedom! School's out for summer for many from next week. What are your big plans for the long break?

angles.name: Road Trip Ready
angles.copy: The summer holidays are almost here! Get ready for staycations, day trips, and making memories. Where are you heading first?

moments.title: Perrie Edwards' 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Little Mix star Perrie Edwards celebrates her 33rd birthday today, July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Pop Princess Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 33rd birthday to the incredible Perrie Edwards from Little Mix today!

moments.title: Jessica Simpson's 46th Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and fashion designer Jessica Simpson turns 46 today, July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Jess
angles.copy: Pop icon and entrepreneur Jessica Simpson is 46 today! What's your favourite Jessica Simpson track?

moments.title: Neil Tennant's 71st Birthday
moments.blurb: Pet Shop Boys frontman Neil Tennant celebrates his 71st birthday today, July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Icon
angles.copy: A very happy 71st birthday to the legendary Neil Tennant of Pet Shop Boys! What's your ultimate PSB anthem?

moments.title: Mavis Staples' 87th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning gospel and R&B legend Mavis Staples turns 87 today, July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Soulful Celebration
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the iconic Mavis Staples! A true living legend of soul and gospel music.

moments.title: Arlo Guthrie's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: American folk singer-songwriter Arlo Guthrie, known for 'Alice's Restaurant Massacree', celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Folk Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the legendary folk singer Arlo Guthrie, who turns 79 today!

moments.title: Luke Hemmings' 30th Birthday
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead singer of 5 Seconds of Summer, will celebrate his 30th birthday on July 16, 2026.

angles.name: Pop-Rock Birthday
angles.copy: Next week, 5 Seconds of Summer's Luke Hemmings turns the big 3-0! Get ready to celebrate his birthday on July 16!

moments.title: Tom Fletcher's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: McFly singer and guitarist Tom Fletcher will turn 41 on July 17, 2026.

angles.name: McFly Birthday
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! McFly's Tom Fletcher celebrates his 41st birthday next Friday. What's your favourite McFly hit?

moments.title: Natasha Hamilton's 44th Birthday
moments.blurb: Atomic Kitten member Natasha Hamilton will celebrate her 44th birthday on July 17, 2026.

angles.name: Atomic Birthday
angles.copy: Next Friday, it's a big birthday for Atomic Kitten's Natasha Hamilton, turning 44! What's your go-to Atomic Kitten track?

moments.title: Luke Bryan's 50th Birthday
moments.blurb: American country music superstar Luke Bryan will celebrate his 50th birthday on July 17, 2026.

angles.name: Country Milestone
angles.copy: Happy Half-Century! Country music star Luke Bryan turns 50 next Friday. Get ready to celebrate!

moments.title: Geezer Butler's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Black Sabbath bassist and lyricist Geezer Butler, a pioneer of heavy metal, will celebrate his 77th birthday on July 17, 2026.

angles.name: Metal Legend
angles.copy: Next Friday marks the 77th birthday of Black Sabbath's legendary bassist, Geezer Butler! A true icon of rock.

moments.title: Regina Belle's 63rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning R&B and soul singer Regina Belle will celebrate her 63rd birthday on July 17, 2026.

angles.name: Soulful Voice
angles.copy: Next Friday, a very happy 63rd birthday to the incredible R&B and soul singer Regina Belle! What's your favourite of her ballads?
